name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLE state

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ state[i] = "idle"
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ state[i] = "trying"
            /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ state[i] = "critical"
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Coordinator is a single process *)
Coordinator == 1

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are stored in a sequence *)
Messages == Seq(Message)

(* Initial state: all participants are in the "Init" state, coordinator is in "Start" state, no messages *)
Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordinator = "Start"
        /\ messages = <<>>

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendPrepare == /\ coordinator = "Start"
                         /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Prepare]) \* for each participant p
                         /\ coordinator' = "WaitingForVotes"
                         /\ participants' = participants

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes == /\ \E p \in Participants: /\ participants[p] = "Init"
                                      /\ \E m \in Messages: /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.type = Prepare
                                      /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> VoteYes])
                                      /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VotedYes"]
                                      /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes No *)
ParticipantVoteNo == /\ \E p \in Participants: /\ participants[p] = "Init"
                                      /\ \E m \in Messages: /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.type = Prepare
                                      /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> VoteNo])
                                      /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VotedNo"]
                                      /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Coordinator receives all Yes votes and sends Commit *)
CoordinatorSendCommit == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
                         /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = "VotedYes"
                         /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Commit]) \* for each participant p
                         /\ coordinator' = "Committed"
                         /\ participants' = participants

(* Coordinator receives any No vote and sends Abort *)
CoordinatorSendAbort == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
                         /\ \E p \in Participants: participants[p] = "VotedNo"
                         /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Abort]) \* for each participant p
                         /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"
                         /\ participants' = participants

(* Participant receives Commit and moves to Committed state *)
ParticipantCommit == /\ \E p \in Participants: /\ participants[p] = "VotedYes"
                                      /\ \E m \in Messages: /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.type = Commit
                                      /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
                                      /\ coordinator' = coordinator
                                      /\ messages' = messages

(* Participant receives Abort and moves to Aborted state *)
ParticipantAbort == /\ \E p \in Participants: /\ participants[p] = "VotedNo"
                                      /\ \E m \in Messages: /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.type = Abort
                                      /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
                                      /\ coordinator' = coordinator
                                      /\ messages' = messages

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == CoordinatorSendPrepare \/ ParticipantVoteYes \/ ParticipantVoteNo \/ CoordinatorSendCommit \/ CoordinatorSendAbort \/ ParticipantCommit \/ ParticipantAbort

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VotedYes", "VotedNo", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ coordinator \in {"Start", "WaitingForVotes", "Committed", "Aborted"}
          /\ messages \in Messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* States: states[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
Eating(i) == states[i] = "eating"
Thinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = i

TakeForks(i) == /\ forks'[Left(i)] = i
               /\ forks'[Right(i)] = i
               /\ states'[i] = "eating"

PutForks(i) == /\ forks'[Left(i)] = Left(i)
             /\ forks'[Right(i)] = Right(i)
             /\ states'[i] = "thinking"

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ CanEat(i)
          /\ TakeForks(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ PutForks(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states'[i] = "hungry"

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
         /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element *)
Enqueue(e) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, e)
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \/ \E e \in 1..K : Enqueue(e)
    \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Servers, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> NULL]
  /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

Next ==
  \/ /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]
     /\ \E s \in Servers :
        /\ state[s] = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
  \/ /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Candidate"]
     /\ \E s \in Servers :
        /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
  \/ /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Leader"]
     /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
